project.name: Email Extension Plugin
project.description: Allows to configure every aspect of email notifications: when an email is sent, who should receive it and what the email says

requireMavenVersion.message: 3.9.6 to use Maven plugins using JDK17 bytecode.

requireJavaVersion.message: A Java LTS release is recommended to build this plugin (JDK 17, 21, or 25).

bannedDependencies.message: jenkins-test-harness version must be defined using jenkins-test-harness.version property

requireReleaseDeps.message: No SNAPSHOT versions are allowed for releases
